seo.title: Contact BEATROX — Book a Consultation
seo.description: Get in touch with the Beatrox team to discuss your next experiential event, production, or installation. Located in Portland, OR and working worldwide.

og.title: Contact BEATROX — Let's Build Something Extraordinary
og.description: Ready to create an unforgettable experience? Get in touch with the Beatrox team in Portland, OR to start your project.

hero.headline: Contact Us
hero.subheadline: We love to collaborate and amplify your voice. We put your message at the center of the story — let's build something awesome together.

consultationForm.heading: Book a Discovery Call
consultationForm.description: Our team of technical and creative directors can help you with your project. We specialize in bringing unique and bespoke ideas to life. We know that every project is different and we can tailor a custom solution that works for you and your budget.

fields.label: Tell Us About Your Project
fields.placeholder: Describe your vision, goals, and any specific requirements...

consultationForm.successMessage: Thanks for reaching out! A member of the Beatrox team will be in touch within 1–2 business days.

emailSignup.heading: Stay in the Loop
emailSignup.description: Join our mailing list for project updates, industry insights, and what we're building next.
